candidate_definition_hints.text: LLM Agent Framework in ComfyUI includes MCP sever, Omost,GPT-sovits, ChatTTS,GOT-OCR2.0, and FLUX prompt nodes,access to Feishu,discord,and adapts to all llms with similar openai / aisuite interfaces, such as o1,ollama, gemini, grok, qwen, GLM, deepseek, kimi,doubao. Adapted to local llms, vlm, gguf such as llama-3.3 Janus-Pro, Linkage graphRAG

source_repo_description: LLM Agent Framework in ComfyUI includes MCP sever, Omost,GPT-sovits, ChatTTS,GOT-OCR2.0, and FLUX prompt nodes,access to Feishu,discord,and adapts to all llms with similar openai / aisuite interfaces, such as o1,ollama, gemini, grok, qwen, GLM, deepseek, kimi,doubao. Adapted to local llms, vlm, gguf such as llama-3.3 Janus-Pro, Linkage graphRAG
